submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
N=4; w=np.exp(2j*np.pi/N)
Q=np.array([[w**(j*k)/np.sqrt(N) for k in range(N)] for j in range(N)]).astype(complex)
golden=Q.conj().T
submissions.construction_method: Conjugate transpose of raw QFT2: QFT^dagger. iqft[j,k] = (1/2)*exp(-2*pi*i*j*k/4).
submissions.self_check: U @ U^H ~ I (atol 1e-12), shape (4,4). Code reproduces.

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
N=32; M=np.zeros((N,N),dtype=complex)
for i in range(N):
 q0=(i>>4)&1
 if q0==0: M[i,i]=1
 else:
  y=i&0xF
  if y==0: yp=0
  elif y==15: yp=15
  else:
   b=[(y>>(3-k))&1 for k in range(4)]
   yp=(b[1]<<3)|(b[2]<<2)|(b[3]<<1)|b[0]
  M[(1<<4)|yp,i]=1
golden=M
submissions.construction_method: Controlled cyclic left-rotate on 4 work bits. q0=0: identity. q0=1: [q1,q2,q3,q4]->[q2,q3,q4,q1] (0 and 15 fixed).
submissions.self_check: U @ U^H ~ I (atol 1e-12), shape (32,32). Code reproduces.

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
def _cmul2():
 N=32; M=np.zeros((N,N),dtype=complex)
 for i in range(N):
  q0=(i>>4)&1
  if q0==0:M[i,i]=1
  else:
   y=i&0xF
   if y==0:yp=0
   elif y==15:yp=15
   else:
    b=[(y>>(3-k))&1 for k in range(4)]
    yp=(b[1]<<3)|(b[2]<<2)|(b[3]<<1)|b[0]
   M[(1<<4)|yp,i]=1
 return M
golden=_cmul2() @ _cmul2()
submissions.construction_method: cmul2_mod15 applied twice = cyclic left-rotate by 2. y->(4y mod 15).
submissions.self_check: U @ U^H ~ I (atol 1e-12), shape (32,32). Code reproduces.

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
H=np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]],dtype=complex)/np.sqrt(2)
I=np.eye(2,dtype=complex)
HHI=np.kron(np.kron(H,H),I)
CZ=np.eye(8,dtype=complex); CZ[5,5]=-1; CZ[7,7]=-1
CS=np.eye(8,dtype=complex); CS[3,3]=1j; CS[7,7]=1j
N2=4; w2=np.exp(2j*np.pi/N2)
Q2=np.array([[w2**(j*k)/np.sqrt(N2) for k in range(N2)] for j in range(N2)]).astype(complex)
iQ2_I=np.kron(Q2.conj().T, I)
golden = iQ2_I @ CS @ CZ @ HHI
submissions.construction_method: iQFT2_on_{q0,q1} @ CS(q1,q2) @ CZ(q0,q2) @ (H⊗H⊗I). q0,q1=counting(MSB), q2=target, U=S.
submissions.self_check: U @ U^H ~ I (atol 1e-12), shape (8,8). Code reproduces.

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
H=np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]],dtype=complex)/np.sqrt(2)
I=np.eye(2,dtype=complex)
H3I=np.kron(np.kron(np.kron(H,H),H),I)
CZ=np.eye(16,dtype=complex)
for i in [9,11,13,15]: CZ[i,i]=-1
CS=np.eye(16,dtype=complex)
for i in [5,7,13,15]: CS[i,i]=1j
CT=np.eye(16,dtype=complex)
for i in [3,7,11,15]: CT[i,i]=np.exp(1j*np.pi/4)
N=8;w=np.exp(2j*np.pi/N)
Q3=np.array([[w**(j*k)/np.sqrt(N) for k in range(N)] for j in range(N)]).astype(complex)
iQ3_I=np.kron(Q3.conj().T,I)
golden = iQ3_I @ CT @ CS @ CZ @ H3I
submissions.self_check: U @ U^H ~ I (atol 1e-12), shape (16,16). Code reproduces.

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
def _cmul2_work():
 M=np.zeros((16,16),dtype=complex)
 for y in range(16):
  if y==0:M[0,0]=1
  elif y==15:M[15,15]=1
  else:
   b=[(y>>(3-j))&1 for j in range(4)]
   yp=(b[1]<<3)|(b[2]<<2)|(b[3]<<1)|b[0]
   M[yp,y]=1
 return M
def _ctrl_cmul(total,ctrl,work_start,k):
 N=2**total;cm2=_cmul2_work()
 wU=np.eye(16,dtype=complex)
 for _ in range(k):wU=cm2@wU
 M=np.zeros((N,N),dtype=complex)
 for i in range(N):
  if ((i>>(total-1-ctrl))&1)==0:M[i,i]=1
  else:
   wi=0
   for j in range(4):wi=(wi<<1)|((i>>(total-1-(work_start+j)))&1)
   for wo in range(16):
    if abs(wU[wo,wi])>1e-15:
     j=0
     for b in range(total):
      if work_start<=b<work_start+4:bit=(wo>>(3-(b-work_start)))&1
      else:bit=(i>>(total-1-b))&1
      j=(j<<1)|bit
     M[j,i]=wU[wo,wi]
 return M
H=np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]],dtype=complex)/np.sqrt(2)
I=np.eye(2,dtype=complex)
H3_I4=np.kron(np.kron(np.kron(H,H),H),np.eye(16,dtype=complex))
N=8;w=np.exp(2j*np.pi/N)
Q3=np.array([[w**(j*k)/np.sqrt(N) for k in range(N)] for j in range(N)]).astype(complex)
iQ3_I4=np.kron(Q3.conj().T,np.eye(16,dtype=complex))
golden = iQ3_I4 @ _ctrl_cmul(7,2,3,1) @ _ctrl_cmul(7,1,3,2) @ H3_I4
submissions.construction_method: iQFT3_on_count @ CU^1(q2) @ CU^2(q1) @ (H^3⊗I^4). U=cmul2_mod15, U^4=I. N=15,a=2.
submissions.self_check: U @ U^H ~ I (atol 1e-12), shape (128,128). Code reproduces.
